methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.device_info
documentation: 获取设备基本/分辨率等信息

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.set_watcher_loop_enabled
documentation: 设置是否启用设备上的 watcher UI 检测

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.get_watcher_loop_enabled
documentation: 获取是否启用设备上的 watcher UI 检测

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.get_watcher_triggered_count
documentation: 获取这个 watcher 被触发的次数

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.reset_watcher_triggered_count
documentation: 重置这个 watcher 的触发次数为 0

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.get_applied_watchers
documentation: 获取已经在系统应用的 watcher 名称列表

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.remove_all_watchers
documentation: 移除所有应用/未应用的 watcher
注意：下面这些 watcher 实现不是安全的
注册时都是统一存储到本地实例的变量中，直至 enable 时才会应用至服务端
这样做的原因是让你知道你都干了什么，过多的 watcher 会影响性能

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.register_click_target_selector_watcher
documentation: 注册一个满足条件点击 selector 的 watcher

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.register_press_key_watcher
documentation: 注册一个满足条件点击 key 的 watcher

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.register_none_op_watcher
documentation: 注册一个满足条件无操作的 watcher（用来检测是否出现过某个场景）

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.set_watcher_enabled
documentation: 设置是否启用此 watcher

methods.name: lamda.client.UiAutomatorStub.get_watcher_enabled
documentation: 获取此 watcher 是否启用
